title: galium rubrum subsp. prostii
intro: Galium rubrum subsp. prostii, also known as the Asparagus-leaved Bedstraw or Galium prostii, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is an herbaceous perennial native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Galium rubrum subsp. prostii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies for its health benefits, which include soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation.
